titles.title: Holy Spirit, you are welcome here

verse.name: v1
verse.lines:
Holy Spirit you are welcome here, come flood this place and fill the atmosphere. Your glory, God, ist what our hearts long for, to be overcome by your presence, Lord.
There’s nothing worth more that will ever come close, no thing can compare. You’re our living hope. Yor presence , Lord. I’ve tasted and seen of the sweetest of loves, where my heart becomes free and my shame is undone. In your presence. Lord.
(B) Let us become more aware of your presence. Let us experience the glory of your goodness.
